questions: Does Step 9.5 stage the sealed session's gate artifacts?
What byte budget constrains the fix?

findings.summary: Step 9.5 stages 7 paths, never .qor/gates/<sid>/; CI completeness makes those files load-bearing; recent seals staged them manually outside the prose
40,929 bytes vs 40,960 EXCEEDED (31-byte headroom); consolidating the 7 git-add lines to 2 pays for the gates argument (net ~+12)
no test locks the Step 9.5 staging list; new wiring test needs a prose-lint exemption reason
dist variants are identity copies via dist_compile; canonical edit propagates
